title: Comment from Participatory Health, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: I have submitted the attached comment on HTI‑5 focusing on the critical role of the National Provider Directory and consumer-mediated LHRs. In short, I argue that accountability and AI-driven interoperability depend on enumerability. I welcome any feedback and would appreciate the opportunity to discuss how ASTP/ONC/CMS can integrate the NPD into policy to ensure that HTI‑5’s technical improvements translate into end-to-end, patient-directed data access.
